metadata.title: 2026 Summer League Rosters
schemaNotes: jerseyNumber is a string so values such as 00 are preserved.
A null jerseyNumber means no jersey number was supplied.
sourceText preserves each original player line.
Affiliation is the listed school, team, or club.
Known punctuation errors in draft brackets were normalized while sourceText was retained.
Boston Celtics head coach information was not supplied and is stored as null.
